name: University of Warwick
notes: Leading fintech research hub; blockchain and digital payments modules included.

notes: Alliance Manchester Business School; strong links to Manchester fintech cluster.

notes: Bristol fintech hub proximity; cryptocurrency and DeFi research embedded in course.

name: University of Hull
